zh.title: 瑞波币/美元技术分析：价格横盘整理，短期偏弱
zh.content:
当前XRP/USD价格在1.136附近小幅波动，全天涨幅有限，仅0.03%，显示市场缺乏明显方向性。日内高低点1.14037/1.13414区间较窄，暗示多空力量相对平衡，短期呈横盘整理格局。价格仍低于20日简单移动平均线(SMA20)1.15110，显示短线仍承压于均线之下。  

MACD指标为-0.00618，处于零轴下方，短期动能偏弱，但信号线数据缺失，需要结合价格行为进一步确认趋势。RSI缺失无法判断超买超卖状态，但结合横盘波动，可视为多空僵持，短期缺乏突破信号。整体来看，动能指标偏向谨慎观望。  

支撑位可参考近期低点1.134左右，若跌破该位置，可能引发短线下行加速；阻力位则在1.140-1.151区间，尤其是SMA20附近，突破需较强买盘力量。短线投资者可在支撑区尝试低吸，并在阻力附近谨慎获利了结。  

交易策略上，保持观望为主，等待价格明确突破。偏好保守策略的交易者可考虑区间震荡操作，短线高抛低吸，控制仓位和止损，避免追涨杀跌，耐心等待MACD与价格形成更明确的多空信号。

en.title: Ripple vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
XRP/USD is trading at 1.13602, hovering near the lower end of its recent 24-hour range between 1.13414 and 1.14037. Price action remains mildly bearish in the short term, as the market is trading below the 20-period simple moving average at 1.15110. This positioning suggests that sellers retain a modest advantage, while buyers have yet to generate enough momentum to reclaim higher levels and confirm a stronger recovery phase.

The moving average structure indicates underlying weakness, with XRP trading approximately 1.3% below the SMA(20). Meanwhile, the MACD reading of -0.00618 reflects negative momentum and supports the view that bearish pressure remains present. Although the absence of RSI data limits overbought or oversold assessment, the current combination of price below the moving average and a negative MACD generally points toward a cautious market environment rather than an aggressive bullish trend.

From a technical perspective, immediate support is located near the recent low at 1.13414. A decisive break below this area could expose additional downside toward the 1.1250–1.1200 region. On the upside, resistance initially appears around 1.1404, followed by the more significant barrier at the SMA(20) near 1.1511. A sustained move above the moving average would improve sentiment and could encourage renewed buying interest, potentially shifting the short-term outlook toward a more constructive stance.

Traders may consider maintaining a defensive approach while XRP remains below 1.1511. Conservative participants could wait for a confirmed breakout above resistance before initiating long positions, while short-term bearish traders may continue favoring rallies into resistance zones. Risk management remains essential, with stop-loss placement below key support for long setups and above resistance for short positions. Until momentum indicators improve, range-bound to slightly bearish conditions appear most likely in the near term.
